svg.title: DataQ system architecture diagram
svg.desc: Full system architecture for DataQ showing client access layer, DataQ application platform on Azure Container Apps (React frontend, FastAPI backend, Celery worker, Redis, PostgreSQL, Key Vault, App Insights), datasource layer (Snowflake, ADLS Gen2/S3, Unity Catalog), and Azure integrations (ADF, Azure Monitor webhook, MS Teams alerts).
svg.text: DataQ platform — Azure Container Apps · Static Web App
